entity: Bill Russell career regular-season total rebounds = 21,620 (BBR all-time leader). Warehouse SUM(avg_reb*gp) undercounts at 21,198 (delta 422)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_reb * gp)) AS career_reb FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 78049 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 21,198 REB but BBR's official Bill Russell career regular-season rebounding total is 21,620. The 422-rebound gap is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap pattern as Stockton, Wilt, Malone, Nash, Kidd. Russell's BLK is N/A in this era (blocks not tracked until 1973-74) so this only tests the reb column. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 21,620.
